name: Security Note
description: Privately report a security concern
title: "[SECURITY] Brief description"
labels: ["security"]
body: |
  > **This template is for non-urgent security concerns only.**
  >
  > For critical vulnerabilities, email directly to contact.samaris.os@gmail.com instead of using this template.
  >
  > Do NOT disclose security issues publicly before responsible disclosure.

  ## Affected Component
  (e.g. Node.js bridge, App Store install, session persistence)

  ## Affected Version
  Samaris OS Mountain Lake Alpha One (ISO / build date)

  ## Environment
  VM or physical hardware? Hardware details if relevant.

  ## Description
  Describe the security concern in detail.

  ## Potential Impact
  What could happen if this were exploited?

  ## Steps to Reproduce
  1.
  2.
  3.

  ## Suggested Fix (optional)
  If you have one.

  ---
  *Security reports: contact.samaris.os@gmail.com*
